old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.58","title":"Reconcile Beads exports after recovery","description":"Regenerate deterministic tracker exports from canonical local Beads state after recovery without bulk-staging machine-local counters, events, version, or host metadata.","acceptance_criteria":"Recovery issue statuses/notes survive; every added/deleted issue ID is reviewed; closed issues stay closed; local metadata/events are excluded; deterministic exports commit with their slices.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:59.596836Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:59.596836Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.58","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:59.71738Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
